name: Sweet & Sour Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place vegetables at the bottom of a crockpot.
2. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
3. Place chicken on top of the vegetables.
4. In a small bowl, combine all other ingredients except rice.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours.
7. Before serving, make rice.
8. Serve over rice.
9. Leftovers can be reheated in the microwave.
Oven Instructions:
1. Place vegetables at the bottom of a greased pan.
2. Sprinkle vegetables with tapioca.
3. Add chicken to the pan.
4. In a small bowl, combine all other ingredients except rice.
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover tightly with foil and bake in a 300°F oven for 2 hours.
7. Before serving, make rice.
8. Serve over rice.
